input.question: How many cloud regions is Atlas deployed in?

expected.conclusion: All three sources agree: Atlas is deployed in 3 regions (US/us-east, EU/eu-west, APAC/ap-south).

input.question: What is the maximum number of concurrent users an Atlas workspace supports?

expected.conclusion: The sources disagree: the public product page still says 50 concurrent users, but internal release notes (KB-1042) record the v3 ceiling at 200 and telemetry observed a 178-user peak — the public figure is stale; the current supported ceiling is 200.
